name: mechanism_ideation
description: Ideate novel mechanism angles for a product claim or result — the 'M' in RMBC. Generates unique, specific explanations of WHY a product delivers its promised outcome.

product_description.description: What the product is, what it does, key ingredients/features/components.

target_claim.description: The specific result or transformation the mechanism must explain.

research_context.description: Prior research output (ingredient data, competitor analysis, ICP insights).
